title: Survival Plus+
body:
![The Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bc756f59574ae5bbda675802395529f3fcc42d.png)

----------

in this modpack i added some mods to make survival mode easier without adding items or animals and such. some of the mods only change the gameplay like Pick Up Notifier, Roughly Enough Items, Bridging Mod, Dynamic Crosshair, AppleSkin and many more. there are also some visual and sound additions to perfect minecraft. see gallery for more

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c01ce5b51228579bcf95aebe39871f68766b9d15.png)
you can also add the mods you want.

below is the resource pack that i use for the modpack but this is optional
- [Vanilla Tweaks (3D)](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#GnFZB0)
